## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] relevant local checks passed
- [ ] changeset added when a release surface changed

## Title format

Use a Conventional Commit title because squash merge is the only merge strategy.

Examples:

- `feat(cli): publish through npm trusted publishing`
- `fix(api): sync required worker secrets before deploy`
- `chore(release): prepare v1.0.0`
